model_output_summary: The proposal matches the active strategy evidence: it assigns Builder durable ownership of the repeatable delivery capability, preserves the stated scope and claims boundaries, and includes near-term operational signals without turning into a one-off execution plan.
reason: The proposed Builder objective is a durable department-level ownership outcome directly aligned with the active Company Objective in /company/strategy/company-objective.md: it owns the repeatable accessibility regression-QA delivery capability for consenting Shopify storefronts, including reproducible browser/keyboard evidence, developer-ready fixes, scoped limitations, re-scan proof, and the required boundary against compliance/certification/legal-protection claims. It makes progress observable within weeks through reproducibility, ticket adoption, verified fixes, turnaround, evidence handling, pilots, and buyer work removed, while remaining broader than a one-off Goal or execution recipe. With no current Department Objective, the revision-replacement criterion is not applicable.
